---
title: Lab Inventory
page-navigation: false
toc: true
# date: Aug 9 2025
---

## Computers

|Item|Description|Location|Purposes|Status|
|---|---|---|---|
|AI Station 1|5090 CPU running Ubuntu, Windows|Training & running ML models|Available, request login|
|AI Station 2|5090 CPU running Ubuntu, Windows|Training & running ML models|Available, request login|
|Ubuntu Station|mit LG widescreen, standing desk|-|Available|
|Nvidia RTX 3090 TI||||
|7280 ?||||
|iMac 2014|||to be replaced|

<!-- ## Monitors -->
<!-- ## Cameras -->
## Specialist Equipment

|Item|Description|Location|Purposes|Status|
|---|---|---|---|
|||||
